# HarmonyOS Project .gitignore template

# Build outputs
/build/
**/build/

# Hvigor cache and outputs
/.hvigor/
**/.hvigor/

# Node modules (if using npm)
/node_modules/
**/node_modules/

# OH modules (HarmonyOS package manager)
/oh_modules/
**/oh_modules/

# Preview cache
**/.preview/

# C++ build cache
**/.cxx/

# Test output
**/.test/

# IDE - DevEco Studio / IntelliJ
/.idea/
**/.idea/

# OS generated files
.DS_Store
.DS_Store?
._*
.Spotlight-V100
.Trashes
ehthumbs.db
Thumbs.db
desktop.ini

# Local configuration files
local.properties
local.properties.*

# Dependency map (auto-generated)
dependencyMap.json5

# Build reports
report-*.json

# Auto-generated files
*.log
*.tmp
*.temp

# HarmonyOS specific
# Note: build-profile.json5 may contain signing configurations
# Consider adding signing configs to .gitignore if they contain sensitive info
# build-profile.json5

# Hvigor build cache
.hvigor/

# Gradle cache (if using)
.gradle/
**/.gradle/

# Android Studio (if applicable)
*.iml
*.iws
*.ipr
.idea/
*.swp
*.swo
*~

# VSCode
.vscode/
!.vscode/settings.json
!.vscode/tasks.json
!.vscode/launch.json
!.vscode/extensions.json

# Windows
[Bb]in/
[Oo]bj/
[Ll]og/
[Ll]ogs/

# macOS
*.dSYM/

# Environment variables
.env
.env.local
.env.*.local

# Debug files
*.debug

# Coverage directory
coverage/
**/coverage/

# System files
*.sys
*.dmp

# Temporary files
*.tmp
*.temp
*~

# Backup files
*.bak
*.backup
*.old

# HarmonyOS build outputs
*.hap
*.app
*.har
*.hsp
